apple_pie.suggestion: Apple pie is high in sugar and fat. Enjoy occasionally and consider a smaller slice.

baby_back_ribs.suggestion: Ribs provide protein but are high in fat. Pair with a salad or steamed vegetables.

baklava.suggestion: Baklava is very high in sugar and fat. Enjoy as a small occasional treat.

beef_carpaccio.suggestion: Carpaccio is lower in calories but is raw beef—ensure it comes from a trusted source.

beef_tartare.suggestion: Beef tartare is protein-rich but raw. Consume from reputable sources and balance with vegetables.

beet_salad.suggestion: Beet salad is rich in antioxidants and fiber. A great choice for a nutritious meal!

beignets.suggestion: Beignets are deep-fried and high in sugar. Best enjoyed occasionally as a treat.

bibimbap.suggestion: Bibimbap is a well-balanced Korean meal with vegetables, rice, and protein. A nutritious choice!

bread_pudding.suggestion: Bread pudding is high in refined carbs and sugar. Enjoy in moderation.

breakfast_burrito.suggestion: A breakfast burrito can be filling and nutritious. Opt for whole grain tortillas and extra veggies.

bruschetta.suggestion: Bruschetta is a light, antioxidant-rich appetizer. A great healthy starter!

caesar_salad.suggestion: Caesar salad dressing is calorie-dense. Ask for dressing on the side or choose less.

cannoli.suggestion: Cannoli are rich in sugar and fat. Treat yourself to one and savor it slowly.

caprese_salad.suggestion: Caprese salad is fresh and nutritious with healthy fats from olive oil. A wonderful light dish!

carrot_cake.suggestion: Carrot cake often contains a lot of frosting. Enjoy a small slice and savor it.

ceviche.suggestion: Ceviche is high in protein and low in calories. A healthy and refreshing dish!

cheese_plate.suggestion: Cheese is high in calcium and protein but also saturated fat. Enjoy with fruits and whole grain crackers.

cheesecake.suggestion: Cheesecake is very high in calories. Enjoy a small slice on special occasions.

chicken_curry.suggestion: Chicken curry can be nutritious. Choose less oil and coconut milk to reduce calories.

chicken_quesadilla.suggestion: Chicken quesadillas provide protein. Use whole wheat tortillas and add vegetables for extra nutrition.

chicken_wings.suggestion: Chicken wings are high in fat, especially when fried. Opt for baked wings and a healthier sauce.

chocolate_cake.suggestion: Chocolate cake is high in sugar and fat. Enjoy a small slice as an occasional treat.

chocolate_mousse.suggestion: Chocolate mousse is rich in fat and sugar. A small serving is best enjoyed as a dessert.

churros.suggestion: Churros are deep-fried and sugary. Enjoy a couple as a treat, not a regular snack.

clam_chowder.suggestion: Clam chowder is rich in protein but also cream. A cup-size serving is a satisfying option.

club_sandwich.suggestion: Club sandwiches can be calorie-dense. Go for whole grain bread and skip the mayo for a healthier version.

crab_cakes.suggestion: Crab cakes are a good source of protein. Choose baked instead of fried for fewer calories.

creme_brulee.suggestion: Crème brûlée is high in cream and sugar. Enjoy a small ramekin as an occasional dessert.

croque_madame.suggestion: Croque madame is hearty but high in saturated fat. Enjoy occasionally and pair with a green salad.

cup_cakes.suggestion: Cupcakes are high in sugar and fat. One small cupcake as an occasional treat is fine.

deviled_eggs.suggestion: Deviled eggs are protein-rich. A few as an appetizer is a reasonable choice.

donuts.suggestion: Donuts are high in sugar and trans fats. Limit to a very occasional treat.

dumplings.suggestion: Dumplings can be nutritious. Choose steamed over fried and enjoy with a light dipping sauce.

edamame.suggestion: Edamame is an excellent plant-based protein source and rich in fiber. A great healthy snack!

eggs_benedict.suggestion: Eggs Benedict is high in calories due to hollandaise sauce. Enjoy occasionally with a side salad.

escargots.suggestion: Escargots are low in calories and high in protein. A unique, relatively healthy appetizer.

falafel.suggestion: Falafel is a good plant-based protein. Opt for baked instead of fried when possible.

filet_mignon.suggestion: Filet mignon is a lean cut of beef, high in protein. Enjoy with steamed veggies for a balanced meal.

fish_and_chips.suggestion: Fish and chips are high in fat from deep frying. Try grilled fish with a side salad instead.

foie_gras.suggestion: Foie gras is extremely high in fat. Enjoy only as a very small occasional indulgence.

french_fries.suggestion: French fries are high in fat and sodium. Try baked sweet potato fries as a healthier alternative.

french_onion_soup.suggestion: French onion soup is flavorful but high in sodium. Enjoy a cup as a starter rather than a main.

french_toast.suggestion: French toast is filling. Use whole grain bread and reduce syrup for a healthier version.

fried_calamari.suggestion: Fried calamari is high in fat. Try grilled calamari as a lighter alternative.

fried_rice.suggestion: Fried rice can be high in sodium and fat. Add more vegetables and use less oil.

frozen_yogurt.suggestion: Frozen yogurt is a lighter alternative to ice cream. Watch the toppings to keep it healthy.

garlic_bread.suggestion: Garlic bread can be high in butter. Use whole grain bread with a light olive oil drizzle instead.

gnocchi.suggestion: Gnocchi is high in carbs. Pair with a light tomato sauce and vegetables for a balanced meal.

greek_salad.suggestion: Greek salad is rich in healthy fats, vitamins, and minerals. A nutritious and satisfying option!

grilled_cheese_sandwich.suggestion: Grilled cheese is comforting but high in saturated fat. Use whole grain bread and reduce butter.

grilled_salmon.suggestion: Grilled salmon is packed with omega-3 fatty acids and protein. An excellent choice for heart health!

guacamole.suggestion: Guacamole is full of healthy fats and nutrients. Enjoy with vegetables instead of chips.

gyoza.suggestion: Gyoza can be a tasty starter. Choose steamed over pan-fried for fewer calories.

hamburger.suggestion: Burgers are high in calories and saturated fat. Choose a lean patty and skip the cheese and mayo.

hot_and_sour_soup.suggestion: Hot and sour soup is low in calories. Be mindful of sodium content if you have blood pressure concerns.

hot_dog.suggestion: Hot dogs are processed and high in sodium and fat. Enjoy very occasionally and choose turkey hot dogs.

huevos_rancheros.suggestion: Huevos rancheros is protein-rich. Use less cheese and sour cream for a lighter version.

hummus.suggestion: Hummus is a nutritious dip packed with plant protein and fiber. Great with veggies or pita.

ice_cream.suggestion: Ice cream is high in sugar and fat. Choose a smaller portion or a sorbet as a lighter alternative.

lasagna.suggestion: Lasagna can be hearty. Try a vegetable or turkey lasagna for fewer calories.

lobster_bisque.suggestion: Lobster bisque is rich in cream. Enjoy a cup-sized portion and pair with a side salad.

lobster_roll_sandwich.suggestion: Lobster rolls are a treat. Choose a Connecticut-style (butter) over mayo for a different richness.

macaroni_and_cheese.suggestion: Mac and cheese is high in saturated fat. Try a whole grain version with added vegetables.

macarons.suggestion: Macarons are small but sugary. One or two is a delightful treat to enjoy mindfully.

miso_soup.suggestion: Miso soup is low in calories and contains probiotics. A great light starter, but watch sodium levels.

mussels.suggestion: Mussels are low in fat and high in protein and iron. An excellent nutritious seafood choice!

nachos.suggestion: Nachos are high in fat and sodium. Opt for fewer chips, add more salsa and beans.

omelette.suggestion: Omelettes are protein-packed. Load up with vegetables for extra nutrition and fiber.

onion_rings.suggestion: Onion rings are deep-fried and high in fat. Consider baked onion rings as a healthier option.

oysters.suggestion: Oysters are low in calories and rich in zinc and iron. A healthy choice when eaten fresh!

pad_thai.suggestion: Pad Thai is tasty but often high in sodium and sugar. Ask for less sauce and extra vegetables.

paella.suggestion: Paella is a balanced dish with seafood and rice. A satisfying and relatively nutritious meal.

pancakes.suggestion: Pancakes are high in refined carbs. Use whole grain flour and top with fresh fruit instead of syrup.

panna_cotta.suggestion: Panna cotta is rich in cream and sugar. Enjoy a small portion as an occasional dessert.

peking_duck.suggestion: Peking duck is flavorful but high in fat. Enjoy the skin sparingly and eat with plenty of vegetables.

pho.suggestion: Pho is a nutritious Vietnamese soup. Add extra vegetables and choose a leaner protein option.

pizza.suggestion: Pizza can be high in calories. Choose a thin crust, add vegetable toppings, and limit cheese.

pork_chop.suggestion: Pork chops are a good protein source. Choose lean cuts and grill instead of frying.

poutine.suggestion: Poutine is very high in calories, fat, and sodium. Enjoy as a rare treat in a small portion.

prime_rib.suggestion: Prime rib is high in protein but also saturated fat. Enjoy occasionally with steamed vegetables.

pulled_pork_sandwich.suggestion: Pulled pork sandwiches can be calorie-dense. Use whole grain buns and limit BBQ sauce.

ramen.suggestion: Ramen can be high in sodium. Choose a broth-based style and add extra vegetables.

ravioli.suggestion: Ravioli is filling. Opt for a tomato-based sauce over cream sauce to reduce calories.

red_velvet_cake.suggestion: Red velvet cake is high in sugar and fat. Enjoy a small slice as an occasional treat.

risotto.suggestion: Risotto is comforting. Choose a vegetable or seafood version for a lighter meal.

samosa.suggestion: Samosas are fried and can be high in fat. Choose baked samosas and enjoy with chutney.

sashimi.suggestion: Sashimi is an excellent high-protein, low-fat food. Rich in omega-3s—a great healthy choice!

scallops.suggestion: Scallops are low in fat and high in protein. A delicious and nutritious seafood option!

seaweed_salad.suggestion: Seaweed salad is rich in minerals and low in calories. A wonderful healthy side dish!

shrimp_and_grits.suggestion: Shrimp and grits is hearty. Reduce butter and cheese for a lighter version.

spaghetti_bolognese.suggestion: Spaghetti bolognese is satisfying. Try whole wheat pasta and lean beef for a healthier meal.

spaghetti_carbonara.suggestion: Carbonara is high in fat and calories. Enjoy occasionally with a large side salad.

spring_rolls.suggestion: Spring rolls can be healthy. Choose fresh (not fried) versions packed with vegetables.

steak.suggestion: Steak is high in protein. Choose lean cuts and pair with steamed vegetables and salad.

strawberry_shortcake.suggestion: Strawberry shortcake has good fruit but is high in sugar. Enjoy a small portion.

sushi.suggestion: Sushi is a nutritious option rich in omega-3s. Choose rolls with less rice and more vegetables.

tacos.suggestion: Tacos can be nutritious. Choose corn tortillas, lean protein, and load up on vegetables and salsa.

takoyaki.suggestion: Takoyaki is a tasty snack. Enjoy in moderation as part of a balanced meal.

tiramisu.suggestion: Tiramisu is a rich dessert. Enjoy a small portion on special occasions.

tuna_tartare.suggestion: Tuna tartare is high in protein and omega-3s. A great light and nutritious dish!

waffles.suggestion: Waffles are high in refined carbs. Top with fresh fruit instead of syrup for a healthier option.
